---
title: "Custom Evaluator Strategy"
description: "Inject a custom evaluator that enriches evaluated results with custom properties"
author: "Karel Dieussaert"
date: "2026-03-31"
categories: [Evaluation, Evaluator, Advanced]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---
# Custom Evaluator Strategy
This example extends [AlignerEvaluator](../reference/Aligner.evaluate.qmd) and injects the evaluator into [Aligner](../reference/Aligner.qmd).

## What you learn
1. How to subclass the default evaluator.
2. How to append custom output properties after standard evaluation.
3. How to run evaluation with the custom evaluator instance.

```{python}
{{< include ../../examples/example_custom_evaluator_strategy.py >}}
```
